task_completion.description: Open the dwanko_run.tnz scene in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz application is open with 'dwanko_run.tnz' visible in the title bar, scene browser, or Xsheet/Timeline window.

task_completion.description: Select Column 1 and Column 2 in the timeline/Xsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Columns 1 and 2 are highlighted or selected in the OpenToonz Xsheet or Timeline view.

task_completion.description: Collapse the selected columns into a single Sub-Xsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Sub-Xsheet column (often visually distinct or labeled as a sub-xsheet) replaces the individual background columns in the timeline.

task_completion.description: Ensure the main timeline only shows the character animation and the collapsed background group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Xsheet/Timeline shows a maximum of 2 active columns (the Sub-Xsheet and the character animation). The other original columns must be deleted or hidden.

task_completion.description: Save the organized scene to the specified project path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Scene As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/organized_scene.tnz', or the OpenToonz title bar updated to reflect 'organized_scene.tnz'.

task_completion.description: Render the first frame to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz Output Settings showing the path '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/organized_verify.png', a render progress window, or a file manager/image viewer displaying the rendered image at that path.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to organize the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz menus, timeline, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually modify the .tnz XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are shown open with the .tnz file's XML code.

integrity.description: The render was generated via OpenToonz's render functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenToonz render window or output settings being configured, rather than copying an existing image via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The original scene contains 11 columns, not 3. To satisfy the requirement that the main timeline 'only shows the character animation and the collapsed background group', the final timeline must have at most 2 visible columns (the Sub-Xsheet and the character column). The output scene must be saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/organized_scene.tnz' and the render to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/organized_verify.png'.
